Explain recursion in one sentence 🤔

Recursion is when a function calls itself with a simpler version of the problem until it reaches a base case that stops the chain.

function factorial(n) {
  if (n <= 1) return 1;       // base case
  return n * factorial(n - 1); // recursive case
}

What are the risks? ⚠️

The main risks are:

  • Stack overflow — too many nested calls exhaust the call stack
  • Infinite loops — missing or incorrect base case
  • Performance — repeated subproblem computation without memoisation
